subcodes.first_line: O thou maidservant of God! Acquire the Persian tongue, so as to learn of the meanings of the divine words and to know the divine mysteries
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله لسان فارسی بیاموز تا آنکه معانی کلمات الهی بیابی و بر اسرار الهی
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings
